author: modulozero
content:
hey folks, quick share of what we’ve been building: https://x.com/staycloakedxyz/status/2037995920898335148

Cloaked is a self-custodial wallet built on stealth addresses. This enables untraceable sends via a privacypools.com integrations, with swaps coming next.

We run a coordinating server (balance aggregation + tx relay), so there’s some trust in Cloaked, but users always control funds and can exit anytime via recovery.clkd.xyz. 

Would love thoughts/feedback. You can sign up in seconds at: https://app.clkd.xyz
